name: EKS Addons
description: Kubernetes addons for EKS clusters - EBS CSI, ALB Controller, Karpenter, Metrics Server, and more

inputs.name: cluster_name
inputs.label: EKS Cluster Name
inputs.description: Name of the target EKS cluster

inputs.name: cluster_endpoint
inputs.label: Cluster Endpoint
inputs.description: EKS cluster API endpoint URL

inputs.name: cluster_version
inputs.label: Cluster Version
inputs.description: Kubernetes version of the cluster

inputs.name: oidc_provider_arn
inputs.label: OIDC Provider ARN
inputs.description: ARN of the OIDC provider for IRSA

inputs.name: enable_aws_load_balancer_controller
inputs.label: AWS Load Balancer Controller
inputs.description: Install AWS Load Balancer Controller for ALB/NLB ingress

inputs.name: aws_load_balancer_controller
inputs.label: ALB Controller Config
inputs.description: Additional configuration for AWS Load Balancer Controller

inputs.name: enable_aws_ebs_csi_driver
inputs.label: AWS EBS CSI Driver
inputs.description: Install EBS CSI driver for persistent volume support

inputs.name: enable_aws_efs_csi_driver
inputs.label: AWS EFS CSI Driver
inputs.description: Install EFS CSI driver for shared file storage

inputs.name: enable_metrics_server
inputs.label: Metrics Server
inputs.description: Install Metrics Server for HPA and kubectl top

inputs.name: enable_cluster_autoscaler
inputs.label: Cluster Autoscaler
inputs.description: Install Cluster Autoscaler (not needed if using Karpenter)

inputs.name: enable_karpenter
inputs.label: Karpenter
inputs.description: Install Karpenter for intelligent node autoscaling

inputs.name: karpenter
inputs.label: Karpenter Config
inputs.description: Karpenter helm chart configuration

inputs.name: karpenter_node
inputs.label: Karpenter NodePool & EC2NodeClass
inputs.description: Karpenter NodePool and EC2NodeClass definitions as raw HCL
inputs.placeholder:
# Define your Karpenter NodePool and EC2NodeClass here
# This will be included as additional Terraform resources

inputs.name: enable_external_dns
inputs.label: External DNS
inputs.description: Install External DNS for automatic Route53 record management

inputs.name: enable_cert_manager
inputs.label: Cert Manager
inputs.description: Install cert-manager for TLS certificate management

inputs.name: enable_aws_cloudwatch_metrics
inputs.label: CloudWatch Metrics
inputs.description: Install CloudWatch agent for container insights

inputs.name: enable_aws_for_fluentbit
inputs.label: AWS for Fluent Bit
inputs.description: Install Fluent Bit for log forwarding to CloudWatch

inputs.name: enable_ingress_nginx
inputs.label: Nginx Ingress Controller
inputs.description: Install Nginx Ingress Controller

inputs.name: enable_kube_prometheus_stack
inputs.label: Kube Prometheus Stack
inputs.description: Install Prometheus + Grafana monitoring stack

inputs.name: enable_argocd
inputs.label: ArgoCD
inputs.description: Install ArgoCD for GitOps continuous delivery

inputs.name: enable_velero
inputs.label: Velero
inputs.description: Install Velero for cluster backup and disaster recovery

inputs.name: enable_csi_secrets_store_provider_aws
inputs.label: Secrets Store CSI Driver
inputs.description: Install AWS Secrets Manager CSI provider

inputs.name: enable_external_secrets
inputs.label: External Secrets
inputs.description: Install External Secrets Operator for syncing secrets from AWS
